name: trylle
description: Operate Trylle repositories and developer workflows with the try CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Trylle with the try CLI
interface.longDescription: Inspect and manage repositories, pull requests, issues, stacks, CI, and platform settings through Trylle's official CLI.
defaultPrompt: Show my current Trylle repository context.
Check the status of this repository's pull request.
Triage open issues in this Trylle repository.
